origin.origins.vampire.name: Vampire
origin.origins.vampire.description:
The main story and gameplay style of Vampires Strike Back.

Bloodsuckers who prey on man for sustenance and survival. Aiming to reach the very top of the food chain.
origin.origins.debug.name: Debug
origin.origins.dhampir.name: Dhampir
origin.origins.dhampir.description:
Vampire gameplay for those who struggle with the early-game.

A half-born vampire without weaknesses, but also lacking certain strengths, with only a single starter weapon roll. Don't lose it!
origin.origins.hunter.name: Hunter
origin.origins.hunter.description:
A more accessible and familiar playstyle for those who struggle with the Vampire.

Despite being outcast from the rest of society and lacking any supernatural abilities, they nonetheless stay determined in their vampire-hunting pursuits. Will the bounty on your head consume you before you can save the world?
origin.origins.wanderer.name: Wanderer
origin.origins.wanderer.description: No story, no starter gear, no stress... For those who want to engage with Vampires Strike Back as though it were Minecraft.
power.origins.0_rolls.name: No Rolls
power.origins.3_rolls.name: Dexterous
power.origins.3_rolls.description: You can dodge 3 times in succession.
power.origins.arrow_vulnerability.name: Arrow Vulnerability
power.origins.arrow_vulnerability.descri: Whilst flying, you are susceptible to more damage from arrows!
power.origins.bad_omen_always.name: Walking Omen
power.origins.bad_omen_always.descriptio: You'll trigger a raid if found in a Village at any time.
power.origins.bad_omen_day.name: Wanted Man
power.origins.bad_omen_day.description: You'll trigger raids if found in a Village during the day.
power.origins.bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
power.origins.bloodlust_alt.name: Bloodlust
power.origins.bloodlust_alt.description: Though you don't need blood to survive, it sure helps!
power.origins.bloodlust_human.name: Bloodlust
power.origins.groundpound.name: Groundpound
power.origins.groundpound.description: Shoots you downward whilst in the air, creating a small shockwave that knocks nearby enemies back and highlights any nearby humans. Grants 1 second of invulnerability upon use, allowing you to cancel fall-damage.
power.origins.healing_kill.name: Healing Kill
power.origins.hold_breath.name: Large Lungs
power.origins.hold_breath.description: You can hold your breath far longer than most.
power.origins.hoodie.name: Hoodie
power.origins.hoodie.description: A simple hoodie. It doesn't do anything, but it sure is comfy!
power.origins.hunter_whip_on_spawn.name: Hunter Whip
power.origins.launch_frequently.name: Launch!
power.origins.launch_frequently.descript: Jump into the sky with a Super Jump! (Press G to activate)
power.origins.lifeleech.name: Lifeleech
power.origins.lifeleech.description: Temporarily steal extra health from slain enemies!
power.origins.low_rider.name: Low Rider
power.origins.low_rider.description: You're more comfortable moving around below ground where there's less UV radiation.
power.origins.max_health_buff.name: Health Boost
power.origins.max_health_buff.descriptio: Killing enemies raises your max health pool (Unless you're under sunlight).
power.origins.middle_of_the_road.name: Middle of the Road
power.origins.middle_of_the_road.descrip: You begin with 5 hearts of health and a cool hood.
power.origins.not_hungry.name: Not Hungry
power.origins.not_hungry.description: You crave only the blood of human beings.
power.origins.no_block_drops.name: No Block Drops
power.origins.no_block_drops.description: No blocks will drop anything when mined.
power.origins.no_way.name: No WAY
power.origins.no_wings.name: Not One of Them
power.origins.out_of_shape.name: Out of Shape
power.origins.out_of_shape.description: You begin with 7 hearts of health.
power.origins.overpowered.name: Overpowered
power.origins.overpowered.description: You begin with 30 hearts of health.
power.origins.propulsion.name: Propulsion
power.origins.propulsion.description: Launches you wherever you face. Look upwards for a super-jump!
power.origins.quest_vampire.name: Vampire Quest
power.origins.quest_vampire.description: Become the Vampire you were always meant to be.
power.origins.random_weapon_on_spawn_dha: You only get one loot roll for the entire game.
power.origins.random_weapon_on_spawn_hun: Who knows what you'll spawn with?
power.origins.random_weapon_on_spawn_vam: Who knows what you'll spawn with?
power.origins.regenerating_wings.name: Vampire Wings
power.origins.regenerating_wings.descrip: You have weak wings. XP heals them, and they can be enchanted to become more durable too.
power.origins.rustic_whip.name: Vampire Slayer
power.origins.rustic_whip.description: Your holy whip can easily lash through the undead.
power.origins.simple_block_drops.name: Block Drops
power.origins.simple_block_drops.descrip: Blocks will drop items when mined.
power.origins.simple_health.name: Full Strength
power.origins.simple_health.description: You begin with 10 hearts of health.
power.origins.sizzling.name: Sizzling
power.origins.sizzling.description: No...! Not into the light! It BURNS!
power.origins.soft_skin.name: Soft Skin
power.origins.soft_skin.description: You begin with 3 hearts of health.
power.origins.spawn_hunter_church.name: Spawn in the Hunter Church
power.origins.spawn_vampire_crypt.name: Spawn in the Vampire Crypt
power.origins.start_in_dripstone_caves.d: You come from the Dripstone Caves.
power.origins.step_height_increase.name: Long Legs
power.origins.step_height_increase.descr: With your long legs, you can step up block gaps that humans need to jump over.
power.origins.sunstroke.name: Sunstroke
power.origins.sunstroke.description: You lose hunger faster under sunlight.
power.origins.super_skin.name: Strong Skin
power.origins.super_skin.description: You begin with 20 hearts of health.
power.origins.used_to_falling.name: Used to Falling
power.origins.used_to_falling.descriptio: Your soft bones and cartilege make you great at taking a fall.
power.origins.vampire_hud.name: Vampire HUD
power.origins.vampire_hud.description: Blood Droplets for Hearts! (DOESN'T WORK) (DOESN'T WORK) (DOESN'T WORK) (DOESN'T WORK) (DOESN'T WORK) (DOESN'T WORK) (DOESN'T WORK) (DOESN'T WORK)
power.origins.vampire_skin.name: Vampire Skin
power.origins.vampire_skin.description: Become the Vampire you were always meant to be.
power.origins.way.name: Waysense
power.origins.way.description: You can sense your way to other Vampires and Humans (in Multiplayer).
power.origins.youre_slower.name: Slowpoke
power.origins.youre_slower.description: You're a bit slower than someone with a pulse.
